headline: Bunge Expands Securitization Program By $500M To A Total Of $2B And Decreased The Size Of The Accordion Feature Of The Securitization Program By $500M From $1B To $500M

headline: Grocery shock on the horizon for approaching U.S. elections as Iran war drags on
summary: "It just pisses them off more," said Rep. Vicente Gonzalez, D-Texas, said in an interview when asked about how voters will react if food gets more expensive.

raw.headline: Grocery shock on the horizon for approaching U.S. elections as Iran war drags on
raw.summary: "It just pisses them off more," said Rep. Vicente Gonzalez, D-Texas, said in an interview when asked about how voters will react if food gets more expensive.
